description: The Violi are a 'ndrina (mafia clan) from Sinopoli in the Gioia Tauro plain, Calabria, Italy. They are allied with the Alvaro clan. Members have been involved in international drug trafficking and other crimes, with operations extending to Canada and northern Italy. Recent arrests include the 2020 Freeland operation targeting multiple clans.

country_links.evidence_quote: i due figli di Paolo Violi erano affiliati alla 'Ndrina Luppino a Hamilton (Canada)
country_links.context: The Violi organization's members were affiliated with the Luppino 'ndrina in Hamilton, Canada, establishing a presence there.

country_links.evidence_quote: traffico internazionale di droga proveniente dalla Costa Rica
country_links.context: The Violi organization sourced drugs from Costa Rica for international trafficking.
